faq.title: Help & FAQ
faq.subtitle: Common questions about the app
faq.q1: How does the Smart Savings Planner work?
faq.a1: It averages your income and expenses over the last 3 months, subtracts a safety buffer, then distributes what's left across your goals — deadline goals get funded first.
faq.q2: Why is my "Saved" amount different from my bank balance?
faq.a2: "Saved" shows only money intentionally allocated to savings goals. Your available balance is tracked separately in the Dashboard.
faq.q3: How do I add a recurring bill?
faq.a3: Go to the Plan tab and tap "+ Add", or open any goal and check the Savings Planner for a shortcut. Recurring items are used to calculate your true disposable income.
faq.q4: What does the Safety Buffer do?
faq.a4: It reserves a percentage of your income (10–25%) as a cushion before allocating to goals. This prevents you from over-committing and running short for unexpected expenses.
faq.a5: All transactions are stored in your chosen currency. You can change your currency in Settings — existing amounts won't be converted.
faq.q6: How do I delete a transaction?
faq.a6: Open the Transactions tab, find the entry, and swipe left or tap the edit icon to delete it.
faq.a7: It tells the Savings Planner when you started using the app, so old empty months before you began tracking don't drag down your income and expense averages.

notifications.title: Smart Insights
notifications.subtitle: Choose when Budget should notify you
notifications.infoBanner: Insights are friendly, non-stressful nudges to help you stay on top of your finances.
notifications.financialAwarenessSub: Track spending habits and unusual activity
notifications.spendingHabitsSub: Get notified when a category spends significantly more than last month
notifications.unusualSpendingSub: Alert when one category dominates your total spending
notifications.largePurchaseSub: Get a heads-up when a single expense is unusually large
notifications.budgetControlSub: Stay aware of budget limits before you hit them
notifications.categoryAlertsSub: Warn when you're close to or over a category budget
notifications.lowBalanceSub: Friendly reminder when your available balance is getting low
notifications.overdraftRiskSub: Alert when spending has exceeded your available income
notifications.billRemindersSub: Remind you when recurring bills may exceed your balance
notifications.goalProgressSub: Celebrate milestones as you save towards your goals
notifications.monthlyComparisonSub: See how your spending compares to last month
notifications.positiveReinforcementSub: Daily motivational nudges to keep you on track
notifications.pushSub: Receive insights even when the app is closed
notifications.pushNote: Push notifications require expo-notifications to be installed.
